2.4. PR #1204: 1203 Define <mark>out-of-range</mark> conditions in CSV get function
…my proposal not to raise an error for an <mark>out-of-range</mark> index in array:get didn’t meet with universal…
…It’s intended for cases where you want to change <mark>out-of-range</mark> values into INF for example.
…on arrays no longer fails if the index is <mark>out-of-range</mark>. Maps and arrays are more symmetric.
